message:
chore(gitignore): Add macOS resource fork files pattern

Add `._*` pattern to ignore macOS AppleDouble resource fork files.
These files are created by macOS when copying files to non-HFS+
filesystems (like network shares or FAT drives) to store extended
attributes and resource forks in a separate sidecar file.

They appear as `._filename` alongside the actual file and should
never be committed to version control as they:
- Contain machine-specific metadata
- Are recreated automatically when needed
- Add noise to the repository

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
